alertRules.name: payment-service-high-failure-rate
alertRules.description: Fires when Payment Service error rate exceeds 10% in a 5-minute window
alertRules.selfHealingLogic: Toggle circuit breaker on payment-service to return 503 instead of cascading 500 errors

alertRules.name: payment-service-high-latency
alertRules.description: Fires when Payment Service P95 latency exceeds 3000ms
alertRules.selfHealingLogic: Restart the payment-service Container App revision to clear any memory/connection leaks

alertRules.name: payment-service-500-errors-log-alert
alertRules.description: KQL log alert: payment-service 5xx errors > 10% over 5 min
alertRules.kqlQuery: AppRequests | where CloudRoleName == 'payment-service' | where TimeGenerated > ago(5m) | summarize ErrorRate = todouble(countif(Success == false)) / count() * 100 | where ErrorRate > 10
alertRules.selfHealingLogic: Enable circuit breaker feature flag on payment-service

alertRules.name: payment-service-recovery
alertRules.description: Fires when Payment Service error rate drops below 2% (recovery)
alertRules.selfHealingLogic: Close circuit breaker and resume normal payment processing

remediation_map.RESTART: Restart Container App active revision via Azure SDK
